name: player_season_projected_points range year_offset sums the offset window in-query (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct 2024 (py 250, tdp 2 -> 18.00) and 2025 (py 300 -> 12.00) projections_index rows, then run player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. Projected points are additive (no range_offset_aggregate override), so the correlated subquery SUMs the per-year in-query draftkings score over the offset-expanded window (18.00 + 12.00 = 30.00), proving it re-scans projections_index scoped to the right years and discriminators and computes points in-query.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(ROUND((COALESCE(projections_index.passing_attempts, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_completions, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_yards, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_interceptions, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_touchdowns, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.rushing_attempts, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.rushing_yards, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.rushing_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.fumbles_lost, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.targets, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.receptions, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.receiving_yards, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.receiving_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.two_point_conversions, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.punt_return_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.kickoff_return_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.extra_points_made, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_0_19_yards, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_20_29_yards, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_30_39_yards, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_40_49_yards, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_50_plus_yards, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_sacks, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_interceptions, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_forced_fumbles, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_recovered_fumbles, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_three_and_outs, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_fourth_down_stops, 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_points_against, 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_yards_against, 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_blocked_kicks, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_safeties, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_two_point_returns, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_touchdowns, 0) * 6), 2)) FROM projections_index WHERE projections_index.pid = player.pid AND projections_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND projections_index.sourceid = 18 AND projections_index.week = 0 AND projections_index.seas_type = 'REG') AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, passing_yards, passing_touchdowns) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2024, 'REG', 250, 2)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, passing_yards, passing_touchdowns) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2025, 'REG', 300, 0)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(ROUND(passing_yards * 0.04 + passing_touchdowns * 4, 2)) AS season_projected_points_0 FROM projections_index WHERE pid = 'TEST-PROJ-000915' AND year IN (2024, 2025) AND sourceid = 18 AND week = 0 AND seas_type = 'REG'
